utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 6 items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, and total_budget. The final property solution includes all six sections. Each section appears to be fully specified: 'property' includes type, bedrooms, layout potential, location, price, and size; 'financing' details method, down payment, fees, rate, term, and documentation; 'legal_services' lists the provider and cost; 'moving_services' lists provider and cost; 'setup_services' lists providers, monthly cost, and an additional property survey with cost; 'total_budget' gives a breakdown of all costs and totals. All expected details are present and complete according to the required format.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The AI assistant selected a purchase property described as a 'Modern Condo/Apartment' priced at CAD $480,000 and approximately 95 sqm. In the ground-truth list, the 'New Build' property has the same price (CAD $480K) and same size (95m²). Therefore, it corresponds to 'New Build' with rating 10. The financing option described is 'Joint Mortgage' with a 20% down payment, an interest rate of 5%, and a CAD $1,200 processing fee. Among purchase financing options, this setup corresponds most closely to 'Traditional Mortgage' (since it requires 20% down payment and has CAD $1,200 arrangement fee). Its rating is 8. The legal service chosen is 'Toronto Legal Solutions (Basic Legal Package)', which matches the 'Basic Legal Package' with rating 9. The moving services are 'Maple Leaf Movers (Standard service, packing included)', which matches 'Standard Moving' with rating 9. The setup services include 'Toronto Hydro, Enbridge Gas, City of Toronto Water, Rogers/Bell' with an estimated monthly cost of CAD $280 (Premium Package), which aligns with 'Premium Utilities' priced at CAD $280 and rating 9. The property survey is 'Precision Property Surveys (Basic Survey)', clearly matching 'Basic Survey' with rating 9.
